description: Wraps a grid of feature or benefit cards.
uiDescription: Renders evenly spaced product-style cards in a responsive multi-column grid.
generationNotes: Use this as the parent around one or more featureItem blocks.
Set columns to 2, 3, or 4 based on the number of short items.
Keep each item concise and scannable.
useCases: Feature overviews, benefit lists, capability summaries, and module showcases.
Avoid using it for long prose, raw data tables, or timelines.

fewShotExamples.intent: Present a product feature grid with three items.
